residual_risks: 47 sequential enforceEntry calls with DB queries on each non-skipped entry. For the current policy (45 skipped, 2 active), this is fine — 2 real DB operations plus 45 near-instant skips. If the policy grows significantly, consider parallelizing the enforcement loop with Promise.allSettled().
The heartbeat check makes 2 DB round-trips before any real work. If the DB is slow, this adds latency to the cron run start.
